text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm eating lunch at the<n>cafeteria...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hiya! Sorry to bother you during your<n>lunch
break! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm here to give you a flyer for my<n>concert and a
headshot of myself! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Well, I'm doing a street<n>performance
tonight, so I'm spreading<n>the word about it!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm just doing what I can to get my<n>name out
there, even if it takes a while<n>to catch on!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
The photo comes with a secret bonus<n>too! If you
scan the code on the back...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You can download my voice to set as<n>your alarm
clock! Yaaaay! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, download it now and give it a<n>whirl!
Don't you want to be woken up<n>every morning
by the voice of an<n>angel?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hey! Wait, hold up! Why are you<n>running away?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! You must be teasing me<n>because I'm
so cute!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! Two can play at that game!<n>Ready or not,
here I come! Gotcha!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh heh! Now no one can stop<n>me from
downloading the file to your<n>phone! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She grabs my phone and changes my<n>alarm's
ringtone to her voice.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! If you like my voice, feel free to<n>stop by
my performance tonight!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After returning my phone, Smart<n>Falcon heads off
to enthusiastically<n>promote her performance to
the rest<n>of the students in the cafeteria.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Aww, thanks! As a reward for<n>downloading it...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Love, love! ☆ Kiss! ☆ Love, kiss, kiss!<n>☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! Cute, isn't it? I hope you drop<n>by my
street performance!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon heads off to<n>enthusiastically
promote her<n>performance to the rest of the<n>
students in the cafeteria with a flurry<n>of love and
kisses.
